calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-NASIR PATEL, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN RANDALL, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM-PHILLIP WANG; CLERK-PARAM NATT; REPORTER-KAREN FARNSWORTH.

CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:- PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT MARCONI HOTEL 554 BROADWAY, RM 33, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ANY BACK RENT FOR NOW. DEFT. TO VACATED THE PREMISES BY 7/20/04, NO WRIT TO ISSUE UNTIL 7/21/04 IF DEFT. HAS NOT MOVED BY 7/20/04. PLAINTIFF TO CONFIRM RECOMMENDATION THAT DEFT. WAS NOT A NUISANCE. IF DEFT. DEFAULTS THEN WITH 24 HR NOTICE PLAINITFF TO CLAIM BACK RENT OF $2800. IF DEFT. MOVES OUT BY 7/20/04 HE WILL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH THE FORMS TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE TO BE SIGNED AND THEN DEFT IS TO BRING THE FORMS TO THE COURT TO BE FILED. ALL AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION.

Notice Of Demurrer Of Jonathan Randall To Complaint Of Nasir Patel
Off Calendar Jun-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT JONATHAN RANDALL'S Demurrer To Complaint: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 06/01/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
